summary: Completed testing of R1, R4, R5 collision system fixes. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Collision tab shows room management UI with dropdown, inline create/delete, and room list when 'Místnost' checkbox is checked.
critical_code_review_comments: collision_service.py correctly uses pg_advisory_xact_lock for race condition prevention
check_lecturer_collision_for_assignment properly checks same-date same-time bookings with matching lecturer_id
Room model has proper FK relationship with Program via room_id
Room collision check in collision_service.py correctly compares room_id when 'room' in collision_resources
assign_lecturer and admin_assign_lecturer endpoints call check_lecturer_collision_for_assignment and return 409 on conflict
Rooms CRUD endpoints properly scoped to institution_id
ProgramsPage.js correctly fetches rooms, creates rooms inline, and shows room dropdown when 'Místnost' is checked
seed_data_creation: Test rooms created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: R1, R4, R5 collision system fixes fully tested. Rooms CRUD: POST/GET /api/rooms, PATCH/DELETE /api/rooms/{id}. Lecturer collision: assign_lecturer endpoints return 409 when lecturer already assigned at overlapping time. Room collision: when programs have same room_id and collision_resources includes 'room', booking at overlapping time is blocked. Advisory lock: pg_advisory_xact_lock used in check_booking_collision. Frontend: ProgramsPage collision tab shows room management UI with data-testid='room-select', data-testid='new-room-name', data-testid='new-room-capacity', data-testid='create-room-btn'.

verified_features.feature: Backend: POST /api/rooms - create room with name and capacity, returns room object with id
Backend: GET /api/rooms - list all rooms for institution
Backend: Lecturer collision on assign - POST /{booking_id}/assign-lecturer-admin returns 409 if lecturer already assigned at overlapping time
Backend: Room collision - when two programs have same room_id and collision_resources includes 'room', booking at overlapping time is blocked
Backend: Advisory lock - pg_advisory_xact_lock used for race condition prevention
Frontend: ProgramsPage collision tab shows room management UI when 'Místnost' checkbox is checked
Frontend: ProgramsPage collision tab shows room dropdown with create/delete inline
Frontend: Room dropdown populated with rooms from API
